raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Atkaſt fanze Jonotans
tam Puifcham pakkat / ſteidſees
tikſchi / ne ſtahw kluffu : Tad
laſtia tas Puujis Jonatanam to
Bultu/ un nahze atkaſ pee fawa
Kunga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Puifs ne finna-
ja ne neeka/ Jonatans tikſai un
Dahwidś finnaja to Leetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad deve Jonatans tohs
Rihkus tam Puischam / kaſ pee
wiuna bija/ un fazzija uſ to: Eij/
neſs tohſ Piſſfahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta nogahje tas Puifs/
un Dahwidś zehlehs no tahs
Weetas prett Deenas Widdn /
un mettehs uſ fawn Waigu pee
Semmes / un paſlannijahs trihs-
kahrt/ un tee ſkuhpſtijahs fawa
Starpâ/ un raundaja abbi diwi /
bet Dahwidś wiſswairak.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Jonatans uſ
Dahwidu : Eij ar Meeru / ko
mehs abbi diwi eſtam eeſch ta
KUNGA Wahrdā ſwehrejschi /
fazzidaui : Tas KUNGS laid
irr ſtarp man/ un ſtarp tewis/ un
ſtarp mannu Dsimmunu / un
ſtarp tawu Dsimmunu/ tas laid
ta paleek muhschtgi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz zehlehs Jonatans/
un nogahje/ un nahze Piſſfahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad nahze Dahwidś uh
Nobu pee to Preester
Akimeleku / un Akime-
leks gahje Dahwidam drebbe
dams pretti / un fazzija uſ to
Kapehz nahz tu weens pats/ un
ne kahds Wihrs ar tewi?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Dahwidś uſt
Preestert Akimeleku : Tas Ke-
nixch irr mann kahdu Leetu pa-
wehlejs/ un fazzija uſ man: Laſ
ne weens ne ko finn no tahs Lee-
tas/ par ko es tew eſmu fuhtijs
un ko es tew eſmu pawehlejs/ tat-
schu es tawus Puischus tai un
tai Weetā eſmu pawehlejs peh-
manni gaidiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ kaſ irr tawā Roh-
kā/ kahdas peezaſ Maises / doh-
to mannā Rohkā/ jeb kaſ zitta
di atrohdahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja tas Preeste-
ris Dahwidam/ un fazzija : Sch-
newa fliktas Maisesmannā Roh-
kā/ ka ween tahs ſwehtas Ma-
ses/ ja tikſai tee Puischu no tahs
Seewahm buhs noturrejſchees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Dahwid-
tam Preestexam/ un fazzija uſ to-
Teefcham tahs Seewas irr ni-
nums nohſt bijuschas waſkar u-
aiswaſkar/ kad es iſgahju/ un te-
Rihki to Puifchu bija ſwehti-
Tad nu ta (*Maise ſchinn-
Waijadſtbā) irr ka zitta Mai-
turrama/ zik wairak/ ka ſchodee-
zitta Maise ſwehtita tohp Trau-
koß.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
